identified_defects.name: Transformer Oil Staining/Corrosion
identified_defects.description: Left transformer shows extensive rust-colored staining on tank, indicating potential oil leakage or severe tank corrosion
identified_defects.corrective_action: Immediate inspection required. Check for oil leaks, assess tank integrity, and determine if transformer replacement is needed.

identified_defects.name: Crossarm Weathering/Decay
identified_defects.description: Multiple crossarms show signs of weathering and potential wood decay
identified_defects.corrective_action: Conduct detailed structural assessment of crossarms. Check for rot, splits, or compromised load capacity.

identified_defects.name: Hardware Corrosion
identified_defects.description: Visible rust and corrosion on various metal mounting hardware and brackets
identified_defects.corrective_action: Inspect all hardware for structural integrity. Replace severely corroded components.

identified_defects.name: Pole Weathering/Aging
identified_defects.description: Wooden pole shows natural aging and weathering consistent with outdoor exposure
identified_defects.corrective_action: Monitor condition during routine inspections. No immediate action required.

identified_defects.name: Insulator Aging
identified_defects.description: Some insulators show signs of aging but appear functional
identified_defects.corrective_action: Continue monitoring. Replace if cracks or electrical tracking observed.

multi_defect: Multiple defects present requiring coordinated remediation

recommendations: • Transformer Oil Staining/Corrosion: Immediate inspection required. Check for oil leaks, assess tank integrity, and determine if transformer replacement is needed.
• Crossarm Weathering/Decay: Conduct detailed structural assessment of crossarms. Check for rot, splits, or compromised load capacity.
• Hardware Corrosion: Inspect all hardware for structural integrity. Replace severely corroded components.
• Pole Weathering/Aging: Monitor condition during routine inspections. No immediate action required.
• Insulator Aging: Continue monitoring. Replace if cracks or electrical tracking observed.
• Schedule comprehensive pole inspection within 30 days
• Conduct oil analysis on both transformers
• Perform structural load test on crossarms
• Update maintenance records and schedule follow-up
